name: operate-os
description: OperateHQ — the operating system for cleaning businesses. Powers Track A (operator profit-share) and Track B (Uber-for-cleaning marketplace).

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.deploy:logs: gcloud run services logs read operate-web --region=us-central1 --project=deep-contact-470100-f0 --limit=50
scripts.deploy:tail: gcloud run services logs tail operate-web --region=us-central1 --project=deep-contact-470100-f0
